data.content: Source edit delivered in verification-orchestrator.ts: transitionToRetry now dispatches state advancement inline via resolveMemoryManagerType(repoPath), preserving knots path (nextKnot with expectedState) and using beads path (nextBeat with currentState). Validation in dedicated worktree: bun run lint (warnings-only baseline), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Integrated to main as 9325f26c8aaf and pushed to origin/main.
